reviews.review_msg: Fernanda was an amazing TA. She cares a lot and is also really cool! She definitely eliminating the intimidation of learning a new language. Participation is a big part of the learning process which could suck on off-days but other than that she was very generous and helpful

Fernanda is a great TA, she's caring and kind. She also made the classes engaging. Participation is really important though and there are a lot of group activities, so if you are on the introverted side you may struggle a little with this class.
